description: Day AI is an AI-native CRM platform that lets users work with contacts, organizations, opportunities, meetings, and related workspace data. It also provides AI assistant capabilities that can be accessed from MCP-compatible clients and custom applications.
summary: Day AI exposes an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at `https://day.ai/api/mcp` and publishes a GitHub-hosted SDK/CLI workflow for registering an OAuth client and authorizing access; no separate public REST, GraphQL, or standalone CLI surface was documented.
